M = Mesial — the surface of a tooth which faces toward an invisible line drawn vertically through the 
center of the face. 
O = Occlusal — the surfaces of the posterior (back) teeth which provides the chewing function. 
Null/missing = Source value is missing, unknown, or not on the valid value list or within the range of 
valid values
